item.title: Mullvad Browser [Browser]
item.itunes:title: Mullvad Browser [Browser]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Mullvad Browser
(Browser)
The Mullvad Browser is a privacy-focused web browser developed in a collaboration between Mullvad VPN and the Tor Project. It’s designed to minimize tracking and fingerprinting. You could say it’s a Tor Browser to use without the Tor Network. Instead, you can use it with a trustworthy VPN. The idea is to provide one more alternative – beside the Tor Network – to browse the internet with more privacy. To get as many people as possible to fight the big data gathering of today. To free the internet from mass surveillance.

[read more]
item.description:
Mullvad Browser
(Browser)
The Mullvad Browser is a privacy-focused web browser developed in a collaboration between Mullvad VPN and the Tor Project. It’s designed to minimize tracking and fingerprinting. You could say it’s a Tor Browser to use without the Tor Network. Instead, you can use it with a trustworthy VPN. The idea is to provide one more alternative – beside the Tor Network – to browse the internet with more privacy. To get as many people as possible to fight the big data gathering of today. To free the internet from mass surveillance.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mullvad Browser
(Browser)
The Mullvad Browser is a privacy-focused web browser developed in a collaboration between Mullvad VPN and the Tor Project. It’s designed to minimize tracking and fingerprinting. You could say it’s a Tor Browser to use without the Tor Network. Instead, you can use it with a trustworthy VPN. The idea is to provide one more alternative – beside the Tor Network – to browse the internet with more privacy. To get as many people as possible to fight the big data gathering of today. To free the internet from mass surveillance.

[read more]

item.title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]

The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.

By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.

item.title: Picture Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Picture Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Picture Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Don’t think that how to restore lost photographs from computer internal and external storage media? Just visit company website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org and install Picture Recovery Software that is fully applicable to regain accidently lost snaps from formatted hard disk drive without any expert’s help. Innovative digital image regaining application helps user to revive lost photos, pictures etc from camera PDA devices due to (shift+delete) operation.

[read more]
item.description:
Picture Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Don’t think that how to restore lost photographs from computer internal and external storage media? Just visit company website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org and install Picture Recovery Software that is fully applicable to regain accidently lost snaps from formatted hard disk drive without any expert’s help. Innovative digital image regaining application helps user to revive lost photos, pictures etc from camera PDA devices due to (shift+delete) operation.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Picture Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Don’t think that how to restore lost photographs from computer internal and external storage media? Just visit company website www.digitalcamerarecovery.org and install Picture Recovery Software that is fully applicable to regain accidently lost snaps from formatted hard disk drive without any expert’s help. Innovative digital image regaining application helps user to revive lost photos, pictures etc from camera PDA devices due to (shift+delete) operation.

[read more]

item.title: Stratosphere x Performance [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Stratosphere x Performance [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
Stratosphere x Performance
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
⚡️STRATOSPHERE Performance Module⚡️
Tweak Module to improve ur experience, Power, Battery and Smoothness on your device.

Focused on Maximizing user experience, multiple Profiles, Changeable in Termux Menu + Many More Features! Stay Fast!

Requirements:
Magisk 22.0+
Latest Busybox
Android 5.0+

Termux Command:
su -c strpmenu

#NewStratosphereMenu


5 Diffrent Profile's!
■ Smooth Ui #--->> Focused On Smoothness, Improve The UI Smoothness And Overall System Speed.

■ Maximize Battery Durability
#--->> Reduce Power Draw And Improve Energetic Efficiency, Maximize Battery Backup.

■ Make It Balanced
#-->> Balanced Between Battery And Performance, Perfect For Daily Use / Tasks.

■ Performance Mode
#--->> Optimize Your Device Performance By Saving Battery And Minimizing Resources Usage.

■ GAMING
#--->> Recommended To Hardcore Gamers, Who Wanna Max Performance While Playing, It Set Both CPU / GPU To Max Power.


FAQ
Does this module work on all devices/processor types?
Yes, this module is universal, but it may not work correctly on some devices.

Is there any chance my device will loop after installation?
No, there is no way that will happen.

I'm having bugs with the module, where can I report it?
For you to report bugs, you must go to my telegram channel and report there, group link ... https://t.me/AndroidRootModulesCommunity.

----
IMPORTANT!
Usually it has to be compatible with any phone running Android OS but,

- Get notified yourself that I am not responsible for bricked devices. We do our best help you out with any problems.
- Thermonuclear war, or you getting fired because the alarm app failed.
- Please do some research if you have any concerns about features included in this Codes/Module
- YOU are choosing to make these modifications,
- and if you point the finger at me for messing up your device,
- I will laugh at you.
------
Created By @CRANKV2 (Telegram)

Some Credits:

Too My Semxy Testers.. @hezenscs,@Legend_Gaming077 ❤

@@FastBoiOp, @RedmagicBoi ❤

Thanks To All Supporters❤️

Stay FAST!
[read more]

item.title: GS NET OPTIMIZER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS NET OPTIMIZER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS NET OPTIMIZER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

In the world of online mobile gaming, every millisecond counts. Whether you're battling opponents in a fast-paced shooter or navigating intricate strategies in a multiplayer online game, a stable and low ping is crucial for success. Enter the GODSPEED Magisk Module developed by revWhiteShadow, a powerful tool designed to optimize your network connectivity and supercharge your mobile gaming experience.
The Need for Network Optimization in Gaming

Online gaming relies heavily on a stable internet connection. High ping times can lead to lag, delayed responses, and frustrating gameplay experiences. Gamers worldwide are constantly seeking ways to reduce their ping and maintain a competitive edge. This is where the GODSPEED Magisk Module comes into play.
What Is the GODSPEED Magisk Module?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module is a network optimization tool tailored specifically for Android devices. Developed by the talented coder revWhiteShadow, this module focuses on fine-tuning your network settings to ensure a smoother gaming experience.
Key Features:

Ping Optimization: The primary goal of the GODSPEED module is to reduce your ping times significantly. By fine-tuning network parameters and prioritizing gaming traffic, it helps ensure that your commands are executed in real-time.

Stability: It enhances network stability, reducing sudden spikes in ping that can disrupt your gameplay. This means fewer instances of rubber-banding or teleporting in-game.

Compatibility: The module is designed to work with a wide range of Android devices, making it accessible to a broad gaming community.

Ease of Use: Installation is relatively straightforward for those familiar with Magisk. After installing the module, you can customize its settings to suit your gaming preferences.

How Does It Work?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module optimizes your network by making subtle adjustments to your device's network settings. It prioritizes gaming traffic over other background processes and minimizes network latency. By ensuring that your device communicates more efficiently with game servers, it helps you achieve those low ping times essential for competitive gaming.
Installing the GODSPEED Magisk Module

Before you proceed with the installation, please keep in mind that using third-party modules like GODSPEED may affect your device's stability. Always follow proper backup procedures and proceed at your own risk.

Here are the general steps to install the GODSPEED Magisk Module:

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted and has Magisk installed.

Download the Module: Obtain the latest version of the GODSPEED Magisk Module from a trusted source.

Install the Module: Open the Magisk Manager app, go to the "Modules" section, and tap the "+" icon to install the module from your device's storage.

Reboot: Reboot your device to activate the GODSPEED module.

Customize Settings: After rebooting, you can access the module's settings to fine-tune its optimization to your liking.

Achieving Gaming Nirvana

For gamers seeking an edge in the competitive world of mobile gaming, the GODSPEED Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow offers a powerful solution. By optimizing network settings, reducing ping times, and enhancing overall network stability, it can help you achieve gaming nirvana with a ping that hovers between 10 to 100 milliseconds. However, always exercise caution when installing and configuring such modules, and remember to follow best practices for mobile device customization.

Give the GODSPEED Magisk Module a try, and may your victories be swift and your ping times ever low. Good luck, and game on!
[read more]
item.description:
GS NET OPTIMIZER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

In the world of online mobile gaming, every millisecond counts. Whether you're battling opponents in a fast-paced shooter or navigating intricate strategies in a multiplayer online game, a stable and low ping is crucial for success. Enter the GODSPEED Magisk Module developed by revWhiteShadow, a powerful tool designed to optimize your network connectivity and supercharge your mobile gaming experience.
The Need for Network Optimization in Gaming

Online gaming relies heavily on a stable internet connection. High ping times can lead to lag, delayed responses, and frustrating gameplay experiences. Gamers worldwide are constantly seeking ways to reduce their ping and maintain a competitive edge. This is where the GODSPEED Magisk Module comes into play.
What Is the GODSPEED Magisk Module?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module is a network optimization tool tailored specifically for Android devices. Developed by the talented coder revWhiteShadow, this module focuses on fine-tuning your network settings to ensure a smoother gaming experience.
Key Features:

Ping Optimization: The primary goal of the GODSPEED module is to reduce your ping times significantly. By fine-tuning network parameters and prioritizing gaming traffic, it helps ensure that your commands are executed in real-time.

Stability: It enhances network stability, reducing sudden spikes in ping that can disrupt your gameplay. This means fewer instances of rubber-banding or teleporting in-game.

Compatibility: The module is designed to work with a wide range of Android devices, making it accessible to a broad gaming community.

Ease of Use: Installation is relatively straightforward for those familiar with Magisk. After installing the module, you can customize its settings to suit your gaming preferences.

How Does It Work?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module optimizes your network by making subtle adjustments to your device's network settings. It prioritizes gaming traffic over other background processes and minimizes network latency. By ensuring that your device communicates more efficiently with game servers, it helps you achieve those low ping times essential for competitive gaming.
Installing the GODSPEED Magisk Module

Before you proceed with the installation, please keep in mind that using third-party modules like GODSPEED may affect your device's stability. Always follow proper backup procedures and proceed at your own risk.

Here are the general steps to install the GODSPEED Magisk Module:

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted and has Magisk installed.

Install the Module: Open the Magisk Manager app, go to the "Modules" section, and tap the "+" icon to install the module from your device's storage.

Reboot: Reboot your device to activate the GODSPEED module.

Customize Settings: After rebooting, you can access the module's settings to fine-tune its optimization to your liking.

Achieving Gaming Nirvana

For gamers seeking an edge in the competitive world of mobile gaming, the GODSPEED Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow offers a powerful solution. By optimizing network settings, reducing ping times, and enhancing overall network stability, it can help you achieve gaming nirvana with a ping that hovers between 10 to 100 milliseconds. However, always exercise caution when installing and configuring such modules, and remember to follow best practices for mobile device customization.

Give the GODSPEED Magisk Module a try, and may your victories be swift and your ping times ever low. Good luck, and game on!

item.content:encoded:
GS NET OPTIMIZER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

In the world of online mobile gaming, every millisecond counts. Whether you're battling opponents in a fast-paced shooter or navigating intricate strategies in a multiplayer online game, a stable and low ping is crucial for success. Enter the GODSPEED Magisk Module developed by revWhiteShadow, a powerful tool designed to optimize your network connectivity and supercharge your mobile gaming experience.
The Need for Network Optimization in Gaming

Online gaming relies heavily on a stable internet connection. High ping times can lead to lag, delayed responses, and frustrating gameplay experiences. Gamers worldwide are constantly seeking ways to reduce their ping and maintain a competitive edge. This is where the GODSPEED Magisk Module comes into play.
What Is the GODSPEED Magisk Module?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module is a network optimization tool tailored specifically for Android devices. Developed by the talented coder revWhiteShadow, this module focuses on fine-tuning your network settings to ensure a smoother gaming experience.
Key Features:

Ping Optimization: The primary goal of the GODSPEED module is to reduce your ping times significantly. By fine-tuning network parameters and prioritizing gaming traffic, it helps ensure that your commands are executed in real-time.

Stability: It enhances network stability, reducing sudden spikes in ping that can disrupt your gameplay. This means fewer instances of rubber-banding or teleporting in-game.

Compatibility: The module is designed to work with a wide range of Android devices, making it accessible to a broad gaming community.

Ease of Use: Installation is relatively straightforward for those familiar with Magisk. After installing the module, you can customize its settings to suit your gaming preferences.

How Does It Work?

The GODSPEED Magisk Module optimizes your network by making subtle adjustments to your device's network settings. It prioritizes gaming traffic over other background processes and minimizes network latency. By ensuring that your device communicates more efficiently with game servers, it helps you achieve those low ping times essential for competitive gaming.
Installing the GODSPEED Magisk Module

Before you proceed with the installation, please keep in mind that using third-party modules like GODSPEED may affect your device's stability. Always follow proper backup procedures and proceed at your own risk.

Here are the general steps to install the GODSPEED Magisk Module:

Root Your Device: Ensure your Android device is rooted and has Magisk installed.

Download the Module: Obtain the latest version of the GODSPEED Magisk Module from a trusted source.

Install the Module: Open the Magisk Manager app, go to the "Modules" section, and tap the "+" icon to install the module from your device's storage.

Reboot: Reboot your device to activate the GODSPEED module.

Customize Settings: After rebooting, you can access the module's settings to fine-tune its optimization to your liking.

Achieving Gaming Nirvana

For gamers seeking an edge in the competitive world of mobile gaming, the GODSPEED Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow offers a powerful solution. By optimizing network settings, reducing ping times, and enhancing overall network stability, it can help you achieve gaming nirvana with a ping that hovers between 10 to 100 milliseconds. However, always exercise caution when installing and configuring such modules, and remember to follow best practices for mobile device customization.

Give the GODSPEED Magisk Module a try, and may your victories be swift and your ping times ever low. Good luck, and game on!
[read more]

item.title: Package Barcode Labels [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Package Barcode Labels [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Package Barcode Labels
(Office Apps)
Want to design bulk barcode tags of various colors at same time? Easily download Packaging Barcode Labels from company link www.barcodelabelmaker.net that is used to generate barcode tags of different shapes such as square, rectangle, star, arc, ellipse etc. Professional barcode maker application enables user to make sequences of barcode stickers by using random, sequential and constant value series creating methods.
[read more]

item.title: Pen Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.digitalcamerarecovery.org website to download Pen Drive Recovery Software that facilitates you to revive damaged files saved in different type of file formats. Usb drive data retrieval utility salvages formatted office documents without wasting time and valuable money. Pen Drive Recovery Software supports latest version of Windows operating system like Win10, and 11 for retrieving corrupted files damaged due to virus attack.

[read more]

Pen Drive Recovery Software supports latest version of Windows operating system like Win10, and 11 for retrieving corrupted files damaged due to virus attack.

item.title: Business Barcode Generator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Barcode Generator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businessbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Business Barcode Generator
(Office Apps)
Do you want to design business barcode in minimal time period? Visit on www.businessbarcodes.org and install amazing barcode label generator application that generates multiple barcode list using sequential series, constant value series and random series option. Business Barcode Generator software works with major printer and scanner while creating barcode images.

[read more]
